name: Frosty Orange Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg.
3. Drain the juice from the oranges and set aside.
4. Add the drained Mandarin oranges to the sugar mixture.
5. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
6. Stir in the raisins and chopped nuts.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes.
9. Blend the orange syrup into the sugar to create a spreadable frosting.
10. Frost the cookies and sprinkle with grated orange rind.
